summary: Book guest for MLK Day 'Let Freedom Ring' episode (January 19)
description: Identify and confirm a guest speaker for the January 19 MLK Day 'Let Freedom Ring' episode. Candidate: Rev. Angela Dawson. Confirm availability by January 9 and send prep questions by January 12.

summary: Write script for January 19 MLK Day 'Let Freedom Ring' episode
description: Draft full script including intro, two interview segments, listener reflection prompt, and closing prayer. Reference Howard Thurman's writings on freedom and dignity.

summary: Winter reading segment: books for the soul (January 24)
description: Curate 4-5 book recommendations for the winter months. Include Barbara Kingsolver, Anne Tyler, Henri Nouwen, and one new memoir or faith title. Coordinate with Midtown Pages for in-store promo tie-in.

summary: Send January sponsor invoices - Covenant Insurance, Mitchell's Flowers, Bluff City Auto Care
description: Prepare and send invoices to all three January sponsors. Covenant Insurance Group: 4 live reads. Mitchell's Flowers: 2 live reads + website mention. Bluff City Auto Care: 3 live reads. Due by January 30.

summary: Produce New Year pre-recorded special episode
description: Record and edit a 2-hour New Year special that will air over the holiday while Rebecca is off. Theme: freedom, gratitude, and community. Include clips from past interviews and listener call-in messages. Deadline for completed episode file: January 22.

summary: WGSP website episode archive missing December 27 show
description: The December 27 archive page is returning a 404. TJ needs to re-upload the mp3 and update the show notes. Filed after listener complaint received January 2.

summary: Book guest for health fair preview segment (January 10)
description: Coordinate with Deacon Mosley for a brief on-air segment previewing the Grace Community health fair. Confirm date, location, featured vendors, free screenings offered.

summary: Create Canva graphics for January episode promotions on Instagram
description: Design 3 Instagram story graphics (@morningreflectionsrebecca) for January episodes: MLK Day, winter reading, and health fair preview. Use WGSP brand colors. Post by Tuesday night before each Saturday show.

summary: December 6 - Grief and renewal: a pastoral conversation (completed)
description: Episode featuring a pastoral reflection on grief and renewal with listener call-in segment. Segment ran 7:05-8:40 AM. Positive listener response; archive posted.

summary: December 13 - Honoring the Women of Faith episode (completed)
description: Episode honoring the women of faith: listener stories honoring mothers and grandmothers, feature on caregiving and faith. Ran extended segment with Sandra Coles on nursing and compassion. 11,400 listeners (peak for Q4).

summary: Radio show 7th anniversary episode planning (2026 fall)
description: Plan the WGSP anniversary episode (show launched 2019). Feature listener testimonials, montage of memorable moments, and one special guest. Target air date late October or early November 2026.

summary: Log CPE: APC Webinar - Trauma-Informed Chaplaincy (3 hrs, Dec 18)
description: Association of Professional Chaplains webinar on trauma-informed approaches in acute care settings. Attended December 18, 2025. Log 3 CE hours toward 2026 APC recertification.

summary: Log CPE: Ethics in end-of-life care - local seminar (6 hrs, Dec 4)
description: All-day seminar at Memphis Divinity School, December 4. Topics: withholding treatment, patient autonomy, family communication. 6 CE hours. Certificate on file with Dr. Vickers.

summary: Register for APC National Conference (Oct 2026) - 10 hrs CE
description: APC National Conference offers up to 10 CE hours. Registration opens January 2026. Conference held October 14-17. Rebecca to attend and mentor two CPE residents attending for first time.

summary: Mentor CPE residents through winter unit review
description: Supervise two CPE residents (2026 winter unit). Mid-unit review meetings scheduled January 16 and February 13. Final evaluations due March 6. Coordinate with Dr. Vickers for co-signature on evaluations.

summary: Log CPE: Peer consultation group - Q4 sessions (4 hrs)
description: Monthly peer consultation group with Rev. Angela Dawson and three other Memphis-area chaplains. Q4 sessions (October, November, December) = 4 CE hours total. Log in APC portal before January 30.

summary: Community health fair planning - Grace Community Church (October 3)
description: Annual community health fair coordinated by Deacon Mosley and Rebecca. Secure vendors: blood pressure screening, diabetes awareness table, vision checks. Rebecca to provide free health resource packets and lead opening devotional. Venue: Grace Community Church fellowship hall + parking lot.

summary: Confirm health fair vendors and send confirmation letters
description: Three vendors confirmed: Bluff City Community College nursing department (Sandra Coles coordinating), Cooper Eye Care, and Memphis Urban League diabetes awareness booth. Send written confirmations with parking and setup instructions two weeks before the fair.

summary: October 31 fall festival and Trunk-or-Treat - Rebecca emcees
description: Annual Grace Community Church fall festival. Rebecca emcees the event and leads a brief devotional at opening. Coordinate with Deacon Mosley on volunteer assignments, candy donations, and trunk-or-treat vehicle sign-ups. Flyer design due October 3.

summary: Promote community health fair on Morning Reflections (January 10 episode)
description: Coordinate with TJ Jackson to include a live promo for the GCC community health fair in the January 10 WGSP broadcast. Deacon Mosley confirmed as 5-minute on-air guest. Talking points prepared.
